main.description: A note about a work, optionally anchored to a specific season/episode.

work.description: Reuses shelf.item's work def instead of duplicating it — same {provider, id} shape.

season.description: TV only. If set without episode, the note is about the season as a whole.

episode.description: TV only. Requires season to also be set — enforced by the appview, not this schema.
